import sys
from collections import Counter

def main():
    n, m = map(int, sys.stdin.readline().split())
    a = [int(sys.stdin.readline()) for _ in range(n)]
    a.sort()
    cnt = Counter(a)
    min_k = cnt[a[0]]
    max_k = cnt[a[-1]]
    for i in range(1, n):
        min_k = min(min_k, cnt[a[i]] + cnt[a[i - 1]])
        max_k = max(max_k, cnt[a[i]] + cnt[a[i - 1]])
    print(min_k, max_k)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
